name: code.compute_indicators
description: Compute standard technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.) on OHLCV data.

candles.description: List of OHLCV dicts with keys: ts, open, high, low, close, volume

indicators.description: List of indicators to compute: RSI, MACD, BB, ADX, EMA, SMA

code:
import json, sys
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(json.dumps({'indicators': {i: [] for i in args.get('indicators', [])}, 'note': 'stub'}))
